subcodes.first_line: Your book was not present before the Throne, yet We read it at the moment it was penned, and with thy Lord is the knowledge of all that hath been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما حضر کتابک لدی العرش ولکن قرئناه حین الذی سطر و عند ربک علم ما کان
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @fire and light; fire and water, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
